title: GRWM beauty — pain-point hook
description: Get-ready-with-me de belleza, arranca con un dolor concreto y demuestra el producto en uso.
body: UGC smartphone video style, vertical 9:16, no cinematic grading, no beauty filters, no color science. Cast a {persona.descriptor} in the {persona.age_range} range as an honest first-person creator (never labelled 'customer'), filming herself in {persona.setting} with 2-3 everyday anchors (bathroom mirror, morning light, a cluttered shelf). Beat 1 (0-3s): she looks into the lens and says, "{hook.line}", framing the pain of {pain_point}. Beat 2 (3-10s): she applies {product.name} to camera, showing the {benefit.primary} with visible pores and natural skin texture. Beat 3 (10-18s): a second layer of proof on {benefit[0]}, handheld with slight autofocus breathing and imperfect framing. Camera: fixed phone at arm's length, one reframe, no gimbal moves. Lighting: motivated by the window, soft and uneven. Deliberate imperfections: visible pores, autofocus breathing, imperfect framing, no retouch. Product moment: the label of {product.name} stays legible and true to shape, no morphing, no invented text. Fidelity guards: keep the product geometry and colour stable across cuts, no identity drift on the creator. Audio: implied room tone, no music bed. Final beat (18-22s): natural close to camera, "{cta.line}". Format: 9:16, {duration}s, {platform}, {aspect}.
author: UGC Factory

title: Unboxing SaaS — authority hook
description: Demostración estilo educator de una herramienta SaaS, arranca con autoridad y cierra con CTA de prueba.
body: UGC smartphone video style, vertical 9:16, no cinematic grading, no beauty filters. Cast a {persona.descriptor} in the {persona.age_range} range as an honest educator/demonstrator (never 'customer'), at a real desk in {persona.setting} with 2-3 anchors (laptop, coffee mug, a notebook). Beat 1 (0-3s): straight to camera, "{hook.line}", establishing authority around {pain_point}. Beat 2 (3-12s): screen-share style demo of {product.name} delivering {benefit.primary}, cursor visible, real UI, no invented menus. Beat 3 (12-20s): a concrete second win on {benefit[1]}, handheld with imperfect framing. Camera: phone on a stack of books, one reframe, no dolly. Lighting: motivated by the desk lamp and window, uneven. Deliberate imperfections: autofocus breathing, imperfect framing, no retouch. Product moment: the {product.name} interface stays true, no morphed text, no fake logos. Fidelity guards: keep UI text legible and stable, no identity drift on the presenter. Audio: implied room tone, keyboard clicks, no music. Final beat (20-24s): natural close, "{cta.line}". Format: 9:16, {duration}s, {platform}, {aspect}, filmed for {setting}.
author: UGC Factory

title: Before/after fitness — transformation hook
description: Testimonio de transformación fitness estilo creator, arranca con el cambio y objeta lo obvio.
body: UGC smartphone video style, vertical 9:16, no cinematic grading, no beauty filters. Cast a {persona.descriptor} in the {persona.age_range} range as an honest creator-style demonstrator (never 'customer'), in {persona.setting} with 2-3 anchors (home gym mat, water bottle, a wall clock). Beat 1 (0-3s): to camera, "{hook.line}", teasing the transformation around {pain_point}. Beat 2 (3-11s): shows using {product.name} and states the {benefit.primary}, sweat and real skin visible. Beat 3 (11-19s): addresses the {objection} head-on with a plain {rebuttal}, handheld. Camera: phone propped on a shelf, one reframe. Lighting: motivated by overhead light, uneven. Deliberate imperfections: visible pores, autofocus breathing, imperfect framing. Product moment: {product.name} label true to shape, no morphing. Fidelity guards: stable geometry, no identity drift. Audio: implied room tone, no music. Final beat (19-23s): natural close, "{cta.line}". Format: 9:16, {duration}s, {platform}, {aspect}.
author: UGC Factory
